title: Methods and field names should not differ only by capitalization
description: Identifies methods and fields that differ only by capitalization, which may indicate a code smelly naming convention.
message: Methods and fields should not differ only by capitalization.
recommendation: Use consistent naming conventions for methods and fields.

noncompliant.description: Method and field differ only by capitalization.

compliant.description: Method and field have distinct names.

why_is_this_an_issue: Inconsistent naming conventions can make code more difficult to read and understand.
how_to_fix: Rename the method or field to be more distinct.

metadata.title: Methods and field names should not differ only by capitalization
